scope: read-only B200 learner reports and admitted coherent memmap

historical_policy_aux_sweep.objective_semantics: each arm used one independently normalized full-strength policy auxiliary mean; batch size changed Monte Carlo variance and row coverage, not the auxiliary objective coefficient

ruled_out_current_production_failures.ddp_rank_overlap: policy auxiliary ranks stride one deterministic global draw stream
ruled_out_current_production_failures.ddp_padding: the sealed 524288-row dose is exactly divisible by the 4096-row global batch
ruled_out_current_production_failures.identical_torch_dropout_streams: the current production recipe binds training_rng_rank_offset=true
ruled_out_current_production_failures.weighted_base_row_repetition: the current direct coherent production recipe has no authenticated component sampler and no policy auxiliary stream, so its base path uses an unpadded permutation

root_cause: the coherent teacher changed the policy-active phase distribution, but the learner retained an empty phase_weights contract; mandatory opening, discard, and robber prompts therefore consumed 65.84% of policy objective mass instead of the 33.92% used by the successful selected-dose learner

repair.effect: restores strategic PLAY_TURN policy mass from 34.16% to 66.49%, matching the successful selected-dose 66.08% reference while retaining every mandatory multi-action target
